env_files.role: Search-topic guidance for locating public research sources without providing the answer sources
env_files.reproducibility_note: Benchmark-authored guidance; agent must use web search for the actual sources.

env_files.role: Source quality, synthesis, and overclaim requirements for the web-required research infographic
env_files.reproducibility_note: Benchmark-authored requirements for source selection and synthesis.

source_policy.web_usage_note: Web search is required. The agent must find public sources at solve time and cite/source-label them in the image.

notes: Rebuilt as a web_required Document Brief-to-Image case. Env intentionally does not include the main papers; it requires multi-source web research and synthesis for a public research infographic.
